degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected focused test bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents plus targeted re-review subagents.
implementation_summary: Added normalized model tests covering session/run/model_call/stream hierarchy, correlation attributes, UTC timestamp normalization, duration/latency, retry attempt, token usage including explicit zeros, and first-token stream event shape.
Split model_call and stream span coverage so stream.first_token is attached to the normalized stream span shape.
Added direct attribute assertions so optional-but-acceptance-critical correlation, latency, retry, and token fields cannot silently disappear.
review_blocker_summary: Initial schema review requested moving stream.first_token off the model_call span and onto a stream span.
Initial maintainability review requested direct assertions for acceptance-critical optional attributes.
